title: Kernelについて、soul.mdもしくはphilosophy.mdを作るべきか？方法としてはobsidianにある情報を抽出して作成する。マルチエージェント・オーケストレーションで点数化して評価せよ
summary_text: strongest_blockers=05_Beliefs is not a stable policy source by default (mixed quality, topic leakage, temporal bias), so direct refresh risks codifying transient opinions; authority ambiguity can let `philosophy.md` drift into de facto top-level policy unless precedence is enforced; manual review alone is weak if proposals lack deterministic evidence/provenance, making regressions hard to audit; update cadence can outpace validation, creating behavior churn without measurable benefit. required_guardrails=hard precedence contract (`AGENTS/CODEX/prompts` always win over `philosophy.md`); proposal-only pipeline (no direct overwrite) with immutable principle IDs and evidence links to specific Belief files; strict eligibility filter (timeless, reusable, non-operational, non-campaign, non-personal-noise); mandatory contradiction/duplication checks against existing philosophy; fail-closed when Belief corpus freshness/coverage checks fail; required tests: static contract check + runtime smoke asserting worldview source and no Obsidian fallback during drafting. smallest_safe_scope=Implement a read-only `Beliefs -> philosophy-delta.md` generator from curated `05_Beliefs` plus one manual apply command that updates only existing principle fields (no new principles), gated by evidence + tests.
